content:
- Executed task 02 from NOW EXECUTE state.
- Restored a minimal managed `PGDATA/pgtm.postgresql.conf` artifact in `src/postgres_managed.rs` without reintroducing `config_file`, added focused unit tests, and extended the HA startup harness to prove `SHOW config_file` still points at `PGDATA/postgresql.conf` while the managed file exists and stays backup-free.
- Removed the dead `self_exe` startup wiring by deleting `src/self_exe.rs`, removing the runtime init call, and dropping the module export.
- Verified the deletion boundary with ripgrep searches; the removed helper vocabulary is gone from `src/` and `tests/` except for negative assertions inside new tests.
- Ran `cargo test postgres_managed --lib`, `cargo test runtime::node --lib`, then the required gates: `make check`, `make test`, `make test-long`, and `make lint`; all passed.
- Docs did not need edits in this task because the search showed no direct contributor/user-facing docs still claiming the removed helper surface exists.
- Ran `/bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh`; next engineer should pick up the next Ralph-selected task, not reopen this one unless a regression appears.

- Read progress log, current task summary, and done-task summary.
- Active bug found: rewind/basebackup source derivation bug, but it is blocked by backup-removal tasks.
- Next step is resolving blocker task IDs against current_tasks_done/current_tasks to identify the highest-precedence unblocked failing task before writing .ralph/current_task.txt.

- Resolved blockers: backup-removal 01 and 02 are done; active bug and managed-config story remain blocked on backup-removal 04 and 05.
- Among unblocked failing tasks, the highest-priority selectable work is story-remove-backup-feature 04 vs 05, both high.
- Chose 04 as the next task because harness/installers/gate-selection cleanup is code-and-test critical and should precede docs/task-artifact deletion in 05.

- Wrote .ralph/current_task.txt with .ralph/tasks/story-remove-backup-feature/04-task-remove-backup-harness-installers-and-gate-selection.md.
- Final selection followed precedence: no unblocked failing bugs; highest-priority unblocked failing non-bug was backup-removal task 04.
- Stopping immediately after task selection as instructed.

- Read the previous codex progress log and current Ralph task pointer.
- Current task path is .ralph/tasks/story-remove-backup-feature/04-task-remove-backup-harness-installers-and-gate-selection.md.
- Next I am reading the task file to determine whether it is in planning, plan-review, or execution state before making changes.

- Read the current task file; it is still in the initial planning state with <status>not_started</status> and no TO BE VERIFIED / NOW EXECUTE marker.
- I need to write a detailed execution plan into the task file, so I am first surveying all current backup/restore/pgBackRest references in the declared scope.
- After the survey I will patch the task file with a concrete staged plan and append TO BE VERIFIED, then stop as instructed.

- Surveyed the declared scope and found the repo is already further along than the task description suggests: no visible pgBackRest references in src/tests/examples/tools/Makefile, no install-pgbackrest.sh in tools/, and no wal_passthrough test file on disk.
- The likely remaining work for this task is verification against stale acceptance criteria, plus any cleanup discovered via compilation or targeted searches in the HA multi-node and harness surfaces.
- I am checking prior task-file formatting now so I can write the plan in the expected Ralph style and append TO BE VERIFIED cleanly.

- Read .ralph/current_task.txt, loaded .ralph/tasks/story-remove-backup-feature/04-task-remove-backup-harness-installers-and-gate-selection.md, and determined it was still in the initial planning state.
- Surveyed the live codebase before planning and found notable drift versus the task text: src/ha/e2e_multi_node.rs is gone in favor of tests/ha/support/multi_node.rs; tests/wal_passthrough.rs and tools/install-pgbackrest.sh are already absent; tools/real-binaries-policy.json already has no pgbackrest entry; broad searches found no live pgbackrest/wal_passthrough references.
- Wrote a detailed execution plan into the task file, explicitly capturing the stale-path drift, the verification-first execution boundary, the files to inspect, the search checklist, the worker split for the later NOW EXECUTE pass, and the gate order.
- Appended TO BE VERIFIED at the end of the task file and stopped without executing the plan, as required by the workflow.
- Next pass must perform the deep skeptical review, alter at least one concrete part of the plan, and only then replace TO BE VERIFIED with NOW EXECUTE.

- Read prior progress log and confirmed the active Ralph task path still points at story-remove-backup-feature task 04.
- Previous pass had already written the initial detailed plan and appended TO BE VERIFIED, so this pass is the mandated deep skeptical review pass.
- Reading the full task file now to identify exactly what to alter in the plan before changing the marker to NOW EXECUTE.

- Read the task file in TO BE VERIFIED state, pressure-tested the draft against live files, and found a concrete flaw in the search plan.
- Updated the task plan to require tracked-source searches only, explicitly excluding generated docs/book output and treating negative archive/restore assertions as expected guardrails.
- Replaced TO BE VERIFIED with NOW EXECUTE, so this pass is now in execution mode and must follow the written plan rather than doing open-ended exploration.

- Worker B audited binaries/provenance/policy/nextest/Makefile surfaces in NOW EXECUTE mode.
- No pgBackRest or restore-only residue remains in src/test_harness/binaries.rs, src/test_harness/provenance.rs, tools/real-binaries-policy.json, .config/nextest.toml, or Makefile.
- Verified the real-binary bundle is exactly postgres/pg_ctl/pg_rewind/initdb/pg_basebackup/psql plus etcd, provenance remediation text only points to install-etcd and install-postgres16, and the ultra-long nextest profile names match the live HA entry tests.
- No edits were needed in Worker B scope; report back to main agent with search evidence and note no residual bug found in this area.

- Verified locally that stale deletion targets are already absent: tests/wal_passthrough.rs and tools/install-pgbackrest.sh do not exist, and tools/real-binaries-policy.json has no pgbackrest entry.
- Verified tracked-source searches are effectively clean: no pgbackrest/install-pgbackrest/wal_passthrough/restore-bootstrap strings in tracked sources, and archive/restore hits are only negative guard assertions in postgres_managed and ha_e2e startup.
- Worker B also confirmed the binaries/provenance/nextest/Makefile area needs no code changes; waiting only on Worker A's harness audit before final checkbox updates and full gate runs.

- Executed the NOW EXECUTE verification across the live codebase and confirmed the task is indeed mostly verification against stale acceptance text.
- HA harness files are clean: config.rs and mod.rs have no backup surfaces, startup.rs only retains pg_basebackup plus explicit negative assertions that archive/restore settings stay absent.
- Updated the task acceptance checklist to mark the deletion/verification items complete based on current HEAD, leaving only the required make gates unchecked before final completion.

- make check passed quickly.
- make test passed with 336 passed / 9 skipped in the default nextest profile; this also exercised the current split-out HA entry tests and showed the repo remains healthy without any code edits in this task.
- make test-long is currently running the 9 ultra-long HA scenarios; holding steady and polling rather than interrupting because this gate is part of the task completion contract.

- Ran the full required gates in order: make check, make test, make test-long, make lint. All passed cleanly.
- Because the live code was already clean, the only repository changes for this task are in the Ralph task/progress state: acceptance boxes, status/passes markers, and the skeptical-plan record.
- Next I need to run task_switch.sh, review git status/diff, commit all changes including .ralph state, push, and then stop immediately.
